rationale: Review 1's finding (make `antipode_convMul_id` private since it's used only internally) is confirmed directly in the diff and uncontested. Review 2's file-placement reorganization is architecturally contested — the module doc explicitly justifies the AlgebraicGroup/ location as Layer 0 of the roadmap — and its second finding (missing `antipodeAlgHom`) cannot be verified from the diff alone, so acting on Review 2 risks wasted effort or unwanted structural churn.
